## 🔒 Non-Custodial Promise

- [ ] This PR does NOT introduce any key storage, seed phrase handling, or private key transmission
- [ ] All signing remains client-side only via WalletConnect v2 or browser wallet injection
- [ ] No sensitive user data is logged or transmitted
